title: leptochilus neopothifolius
intro: Leptochilus neopothifolius, also known as Leptochilus, is a type of fern plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Leptochilus neopothifolius is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Leptochilus neopothifolius include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
